properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7 v3 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Time after time It's all the same I forget who I am I take Your place The bigger I get The harder I fall I act like I don't need You at all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And one by one my bridges burn Until I've nowhere left to turn But it's You who's right there for me And it's You who writes my story

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I need an earthquake To shake me until it breaks me down I'm giving You everything My pride's crashing to the ground Shatter my walls, let my kingdom fall I don't wanna wear this crown no more My heart is Yours to take It's You that can save me It's You that can shake me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need an earthquake I need an earthquake

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've lived on the edge for way too long Walking a tightrope on my own When out of the dark I heard You call Now, into Your hands I surrender all

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So take my heart and shape it up To build me into what You want ‘Cause it’s You who sees right through me You’re the only one that moves me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I lift my hands I lift my hands high My heart is open My heart is open wide Show me life Show me a new life Where all that’s left Where all that’s left is You and I

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I need an earthquake To shake me until it breaks me down
